sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SunOpta gets court approval for $6.50 per share Refresco deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc. has received final approval from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice for its acquisition by an affiliate of Refresco Holding B.V., valued at $6.50 per share in cash. The Canadian competition clearance condition has also been satisfied. The acquisition is still subject to further regulatory clearances and standard closing conditions.

feed.title: Joby Aviation Stock Falls as LA Air Taxi Vertiport Plan Meets Certification Reality
feed.summary: Joby Aviation's stock fell 7.1% after announcing plans with Reuben Brothers to convert a Los Angeles helipad into a vertiport for its electric air taxis, an initiative aimed at establishing an L.A. network. The announcement coincided with a broad decline in air-taxi stocks, as investors remain focused on Joby's progress with certification, financial updates, and production targets ahead of its Q1 earnings call on May 5th. Despite testing its first production model and aiming for limited U.S. operations this year, the company faces significant regulatory hurdles and market skepticism regarding its ambitious goals.

feed.title: Before the bell, FIS posts Q1 results May 8 and hosts 8:30 webcast
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a financial services technology leader, will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 8th, before market open. The company will also host a live webcast of its earnings conference call for the investment community at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Investors can access the webcast and a replay afterward through the Investor Relations section of FIS's homepage.

feed.title: June 15 payout set: Southern California Edison declares 4 dividends
feed.summary: Southern California Edison's board of directors has declared four quarterly dividends for its preference stocks: Series G, L, M, and N. These dividends are scheduled for payment on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. Southern California Edison, an Edison International company, is a major electric utility serving approximately 15 million people in Central, Coastal, and Southern California.

feed.title: Digital Realty Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Digital Realty (DLR) has announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, releasing detailed earnings and supplemental materials online. The company also posted investor presentations and plans to participate in several major investor conferences in May and June 2026. According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DLR is rated Neutral, driven by improving financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook, though valuation due to a high P/E is a concern.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines shareholders get 18.75-cent dividend on June 4
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share, payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. This announcement provides a scheduled cash distribution to the airline's investors. The dividend declaration was made by Delta's Board of Directors on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $1.81
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE: APD) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.81 per share, with an ex-dividend date of July 1st and payment on August 10th. The company has a 43-year history of increasing dividends, with a current payout ratio of 55.4%, well-covered by earnings. Shares traded up to $303.67, near their 52-week high, following a Q1 EPS beat and strong guidance for Q2 and the full fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.05 EPS
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) reported its quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates by $0.05 with an EPS of $0.78. Despite the positive earnings surprise, the stock traded down by $1.84 to $79.69, though Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $95.74. Recent insider stock sales by the CFO and VP were also disclosed, alongside significant hedge fund activity in the company.

feed.title: Bank of America declares quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share
feed.summary: Bank of America has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on common stock, maintaining continuous payments for 56 years and raising it for 12 consecutive years. The dividend is payable on June 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 5, 2026. This announcement follows strong first-quarter 2026 results and positive analyst ratings, with the stock currently deemed undervalued by InvestingPro.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand sets June 4 payout for $0.02 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on June 4, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 14, 2026. Ingersoll Rand is a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and life science and industrial solutions.

feed.title: Charles Schwab declares $0.32 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per common share, payable on May 22, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 8, 2026. This marks the 38th consecutive year of dividend payments for the company, which also declared dividends on several series of preferred stock. Analysts have mixed outlooks on Charles Schwab, with some maintaining positive ratings while others have lowered price targets despite strong first-quarter results.

feed.title: Newmont: Board Approves Added $6B Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Newmont's Board of Directors has approved an additional $6 billion share repurchase program, increasing the total authorization to $7 billion. The company emphasizes its commitment to delivering value to shareholders through capital allocation strategies, including dividends and repurchases. This move underscores Newmont's confidence in its financial position and future prospects.

feed.title: Gartner ups IT spending growth to 13.5% in revised forecast
feed.summary: Gartner has revised its global IT spending forecast for 2026 upwards to 13.5% growth, totaling $6.31 trillion. This increase, nearly 3% higher than its previous forecast, is primarily driven by accelerated investment in AI infrastructure, software, and IaaS. The firm highlights data center systems, with a projected 55.8% growth exceeding $787 million, as the leading segment due to hyperscaler demand and record price increases for high-bandwidth memory.

feed.title: Atomera expands Synopsys collaboration for GaN device modeling By Investing.com
feed.summary: Atomera Incorporated has announced an expanded collaboration with Synopsys, Inc. to advance gallium nitride (GaN) device modeling for radio frequency and power semiconductor applications. This partnership will see Atomera use Synopsys’ Sentaurus TCAD tools to develop GaN calibration methodologies and create marketing materials. The collaboration builds on their established relationship for modeling Atomera's Mears Silicon Technology and aims to improve the design of more efficient devices.

feed.title: Digital Realty Q1 earnings beat on robust data center demand; 2026 guidance raised (DLR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Digital Realty (DLR) reported Q1 earnings and revenue that surpassed Wall Street estimates, driven by strong demand for data centers and advancements in hyperscale AI-oriented capacity. The company's core FFO per share and total operating revenue both exceeded consensus, leading to increased full-year guidance for 2026. Key drivers include record interconnection leasing and the largest hyperscale lease in its history.

feed.title: US FDA rejects AbbVie's wrinkle treatment due to manufacturing concerns
feed.summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has declined to approve AbbVie's experimental wrinkle treatment, TrenibotE, due to manufacturing concerns. The company clarified that the FDA did not raise issues regarding the treatment's safety or efficacy, nor did it request new patient studies. TrenibotE is a fast-acting botulinum toxin designed to treat facial wrinkles with a quicker wear-off period compared to traditional Botox.

feed.title: CSGP Maintained by Citigroup -- Price Target Lowered to $70.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained its "Buy" rating for CoStar Group (CSGP) but significantly lowered the price target from $100.00 to $70.00, a 30% reduction. Despite the lowered price target, GuruFocus indicates CSGP is 62.3% undervalued with a strong GF Value™, though its trailing P/E ratio is exceptionally high. Insider activity shows $3.5 million in purchases over the past three months, suggesting confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Earnings Beat Estimates
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (AMP) reported strong first-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share of $11.26, significantly exceeding Wall Street's expectation of $10.21. The wealth management company also announced a 12% increase in its assets under administration.

feed.title: Teledyne Marine Launches 2026 Global Video Contest
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has announced its 2026 Global Video Contest, inviting customers and partners to share videos showcasing how Teledyne Marine technologies are used in ocean science, offshore operations, and subsea exploration. The contest, which builds on the success of an annual photo contest, focuses on real missions, data, and innovation. Submissions are open until August 1, 2026, with winners receiving field-ready gear, including a GoPro HERO13 Black, and featured across Teledyne Marine's global channels.

feed.title: ONEOK Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) announced that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.07 per share, consistent with the previous quarter's payout. This results in an annualized dividend of $4.28 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. The company, a leading midstream operator, delivers essential energy products and services through its extensive pipeline network.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (AMP) Ameriprise Financial, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $11.26 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $10.21
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (AMP) reported its Q1 adjusted EPS at $11.26 per share, significantly exceeding FactSet's estimate of $10.21. This news highlights the company's stronger-than-expected financial performance for the first quarter.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) keeps $0.155 common dividend, sets preferred payouts
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share, maintaining the previous quarter's payout. The common dividend is scheduled for payment on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record by June 17, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved quarterly cash dividends for various series of preferred stock, with most payable on July 15, 2026, and the 5.50% Series L preferred dividend payable on August 20, 2026.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Cuts Busy Routes In Major Summer Planning Shift : Latest Update
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is adjusting its summer 2026 schedule by suspending several busy routes, a "summer planning" move driven by rising fuel costs and changing passenger demand. This comes even as Delta expands its transatlantic schedule, indicating a reallocation of capacity towards more profitable routes. The changes mean fewer flight options and potential price increases for travelers, emphasizing the need for early booking and flexibility.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PFG) Principal Financial Group, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $2.07 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $2.01
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group, Inc. (PFG) announced Q1 adjusted EPS of $2.07 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $2.01. The financial services group, which specializes in retirement fund management, insurance, and asset management, reported its earnings on April 23, 2026, during trading hours. This positive earnings surprise comes amidst recent analyst adjustments to price targets for the company.

feed.title: AIG Unit Must Face County’s Revived Contamination Coverage Suit
feed.summary: A San Bernardino County, California, lawsuit against an AIG unit has been revived by the Ninth Circuit. The county is seeking coverage for environmental damage at Chino Airport from decades-old wars. The court ruled that the insurer's provision on annual aggregate limits was ambiguous under California law.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust: Record bookings, raised guidance, and strong demand drive robust Q1 2026 financial performance
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, characterized by record bookings and backlog, double-digit growth in revenue and Core FFO per share, and strategic expansion into new markets. The company also raised its guidance for 2026 across key metrics, citing robust demand and a solid debt profile. This performance indicates a positive outlook for the data center REIT.

feed.title: Is Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) stock has seen a recent pullback, dropping 1.4% in the last 7 days and 3.3% over the last month, despite positive year-to-date and one-year returns. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 31.9% undervalued, its current P/E ratio of 30.99x is above the industry average and Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 23.45x, indicating it might be overvalued by P/E measures. The article encourages investors to consider multiple valuation approaches and narratives.

feed.title: Heart-valve demand drives Edwards to raise 2026 forecast
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with overall sales up 16.7% and Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) sales increasing by 14.4%. Due to this performance and increasing demand for heart valve therapies, the company has raised its full-year 2026 sales growth guidance and adjusted EPS outlook. The company also highlighted positive clinical trial data for its TAVR and Transcatheter Mitral and Tricuspid Therapies, indicating a shift towards proactive disease management in structural heart care.

feed.title: Danaher’s €3b Euro Debt Issue And What It Means For Valuation
feed.summary: Danaher (NYSE:DHR) has launched a significant €3 billion euro-denominated debt offering through senior notes to fund its pending acquisition of Masimo Corporation. This move introduces a new component to Danaher's capital structure, and investors should monitor future interest expenses, leverage ratios, and the integration of Masimo. Despite recent stock weakness, analysts view Danaher as undervalued, noting its strong balance sheet despite increased debt.

feed.title: T-Mobile (TMUS) boosts 2026 buyback and dividend plan by $3.6B
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (TMUS) has increased its 2026 shareholder return program by $3.6 billion, bringing the total authorization to $18.2 billion through December 31, 2026. This enlarged program includes both common stock repurchases and cash dividends, with two $1.02 per share dividends already announced for Q1 and Q2 2026. Funding for these shareholder returns is expected to come from cash on hand and potential debt issuances, subject to market conditions and Board discretion.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Increases Regular Quarterly Dividend 6 Percent
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) announced a 6 percent increase in its regular quarterly cash dividend, raising it to $1.70 per share. The dividend is payable on May 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. This decision reflects the company's continued asset growth and strong financial performance, following a record first quarter adjusted operating earnings per diluted share.

feed.title: NextEra Earnings: FP&L and NEER Positioned Well for Accelerating Data Center Demand
feed.summary: NextEra Energy reported strong first-quarter operating earnings, driven by growth in both FP&L and NextEra Energy Resources (NEER). The company is on track to meet its financial targets, affirming its $86 fair value estimate and narrow moat rating. Management expects significant growth from data center demand, with FPL reporting long-term interest and NEER targeting substantial new capacity additions by 2035.

feed.title: Principal Financial returns $374M, lifts dividend to $0.82
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFG) announced strong first-quarter 2026 results, reporting non-GAAP operating earnings per diluted share of $2.17, a 13% increase year-over-year. The company returned $374 million to shareholders through share repurchases and common stock dividends, and raised its second-quarter dividend by $0.02 to $0.82 per share. PFG highlighted robust growth across its segments, including a significant increase in Assets Under Management to $770 billion.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Investment Management Launches Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) has launched the Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio (MSNXX), a new government money market fund specifically designed for stablecoin issuers to invest their required reserves. This initiative aligns with the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act (GENIUS Act) and aims to provide capital preservation, daily liquidity, and maximum current income for stablecoin reserves. This move expands MSIM's digital assets offerings, building on their earlier introduction of the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT) and participation in BNY's tokenization initiative.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc Stock (MO) Closed Up by 3.04% on Apr 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. (MO) closed up by 3.04% on April 23rd, driven by increased institutional investor activity, reaffirmed 2026 EPS guidance, a stable dividend, and the national expansion of its on! PLUS nicotine pouches. Despite some "Hold" ratings, several firms have raised price targets, reflecting optimism in the company's strategic advancements and financial stability, even as technical indicators present mixed signals. The company continues to face challenges such as declining cigarette volumes and regulatory hurdles but is diversifying into smoke-free alternatives.

feed.title: West Pharma sees plastics, elastomer demand surge with GLP-1 growth
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services is experiencing a significant increase in demand for plastics and elastomers due to the growth of GLP-1 products. The company recently expanded its capacity for GLP-1 related manufacturing with a new 165,000-square-foot facility in Dublin. This surge is highlighted against a backdrop of increasing resin prices for materials like PP, PVC, PS, and PE.

feed.title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names R. Christopher DeLauder President of Berkley Environmental
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation has appointed R. Christopher DeLauder as president of Berkley Environmental, succeeding Kenneth J. Berger, who will now serve as chair of the business. DeLauder brings nearly 40 years of environmental insurance experience, having previously served as executive vice president at Berkley Environmental since joining in 2010. W. Robert Berkley, Jr. expressed confidence in DeLauder's leadership and gratitude for Berger's instrumental contributions to the company's success.

feed.title: Blackstone’s Schwarzman says AI data center portfolio can double from here as firm touts $150 billion in assets
feed.summary: Stephen Schwarzman, CEO of Blackstone, believes the firm's AI data center portfolio, currently valued at $150 billion, has the potential to double in size. This statement highlights Blackstone's significant investment and bullish outlook on the AI infrastructure sector. The article underscores the growing importance of data centers in supporting artificial intelligence development.

feed.title: Edison International appoints Aaron D. Moss as CFO; Maria Rigatti to retire
feed.summary: Edison International has appointed Aaron D. Moss as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective July 3, 2026. Maria Rigatti will resign from her CFO role on the same date and retire on September 1, 2026. Additionally, M. Susan Hardwick has been elected to the company's Board of Directors, effective April 23, 2026.

feed.title: CLX Maintained by Morgan Stanley -- Price Target Lowered to $110
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has maintained an Equal-Weight rating for Clorox (CLX) but lowered its price target from $136 to $110, reflecting a cautious market outlook. Despite this, GuruFocus indicates that CLX is currently undervalued by 27.7%, with a GF Value of $135.81 compared to its current price of $98.16. The company shows strong profitability and valuation but faces challenges in financial strength and growth.

feed.title: Principal posts $425M 1Q26 net income, adjusted EPS $2.07; raises Q2 dividend to $0.82
feed.summary: Principal (PFG) reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $424.6 million and adjusted earnings per diluted share of $2.07. The company raised its second-quarter common stock dividend to $0.82 per share and returned $374 million to shareholders. Assets under management reached $770.2 billion, with strong performance noted across several segments including Retirement and Income Solutions, Investment Management, International Pension, Specialty Benefits, and Life Insurance.

feed.title: Paycom Secures $2.125 Billion Five-Year Secured Revolving Credit Facility Led by JPMorgan
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (PAYC) has secured a new senior secured revolving credit facility totaling up to $2.125 billion. Led by JPMorgan, this five-year facility is intended for general corporate purposes, including working capital, acquisitions, and share repurchases, and matures on April 23, 2031. Approximately $675 million was outstanding under the facility as of April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Newmont posts $3.3B Q1 net income, record $3.1B free cash flow and raises repurchase authorization
feed.summary: Newmont reported exceptional first-quarter 2026 results, achieving a net income of $3.3 billion and a record $3.1 billion in free cash flow. The company also announced an additional $6.0 billion share repurchase authorization, reflecting strong financial health and confidence. Despite some production declines due to various operational impacts, solid performance in by-product metals and strategic capital allocation contributed to these positive outcomes.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (NEM) Newmont Corporation Reports Q1 Revenue $7.31B, vs. FactSet Est of $6.57B
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NEM) announced its Q1 revenue reached $7.31 billion, significantly surpassing FactSet's estimated $6.57 billion. This positive financial result comes as the company also reported adjusted earnings per share of $2.90, exceeding analyst expectations of $2.18 for the first quarter.

feed.title: The Hartford Reports Q1 2026: Net Income $851M, Core Earnings $866M, EPS $3.09
feed.summary: The Hartford reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with net income of $851 million and core earnings of $866 million, reflecting significant year-over-year increases in EPS. The company also saw growth in Property & Casualty written premiums and improvements in Personal Insurance and Employee Benefits, while returning $617 million to stockholders.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust Inc. (DLR) reported its first-quarter earnings, with funds from operations (FFO) of $2.04 per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectation of $1.94 per share. The real estate investment trust also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $1.64 billion against an expected $1.61 billion. The company anticipates full-year FFO to be between $8 and $8.10 per share.

feed.title: Is Tractor Supply (TSCO) One of the Low Priced Stocks to Buy with Huge Upside Potential?
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) reported a 3.6% increase in net sales to $3.59 billion for FQ1 2026, driven by new store openings and digital sales growth, despite an 8.3% decrease in net income and flat gross margins due to higher tariffs and operating expenses. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 outlook, projecting net sales between $14.8 and $15.1 billion, and continues to return capital to shareholders. While TSCO shows potential, the article suggests that certain AI stocks might offer better short-term returns.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Raises Steel Dynamics (STLD) Price Target to $207, Stays Bullish on Steel
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Steel Dynamics (STLD) to $207 from $196, maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. The firm expressed a positive outlook on the steel and aluminum sectors ahead of Q1 results. This comes as Steel Dynamics reported a first-quarter revenue of $5.20 billion, surpassing analyst expectations, driven by higher steel prices and lower scrap costs.

feed.title: JPMorgan Raises Nucor (NUE) Price Target to $212, Sees Tight Supply Supporting Steel Sector
feed.summary: JPMorgan has increased its price target for Nucor (NUE) to $212 from $198, maintaining an Overweight rating, citing tight supply and mixed demand supporting the steel sector. Goldman Sachs also initiated coverage with a Buy rating and a $210 price target, bullish on US steel equities due to sustained higher prices from section 232 tariffs and expected demand growth in infrastructure and non-residential construction. Nucor, a steel manufacturer, is seen as a lower-beta company benefiting from metal margin expansion and product diversification amidst macro uncertainty.

feed.title: (DLR) Digital Realty Trust Expects 2026 Core FFO Range $8 - $8.10, vs. FactSet Est of $7.96
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) anticipates its 2026 Core FFO to be in the range of $8.00 to $8.10. This projection surpasses FactSet's estimated FFO of $7.96. The company disclosed this information, along with its Q1 Core FFO and revenue increases, and a raised 2026 guidance.
